summary: TRUST-BOUNDARY plan fix-A claims to eliminate 12 as-any casts but only covers 4 of 12; 8 capability-related casts (lines 332, 334, 338, 371, 379, 431, 440, 443) in plugin/index.ts remain unaddressed
detail: The plan's fix-A before/after only covers lines 437 and 476 in plugin/index.ts and lines 53,57 in hook-dispatch-guard.ts. It leaves behind 8 additional `as any` casts. Most critically, line 332 (`"secrets.access" as any`) is a direct capability bypass — if CapabilityId becomes branded, this cast will still allow any string through. Line 443 casts dispatchGuard as HookDispatchGuard to bypass the type. Lines 334, 338, 371, 379, 431, 440 are hook-dispatch `as any` casts that allow unchecked property access on hooks.
